title: Turkish-Style Grilled Monkfish Kebap
description: A flavorful and spicy Turkish-inspired kebap featuring grilled monkfish, served with a side of charred vegetables for a delicious and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Turkish Adana kebap spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together Adana kebap spice mix, garlic, and lemon juice.
3. Brush the monkfish fillets with olive oil and season with the spice mix.
4. Grill the monkfish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, grill the charred red peppers until slightly charred and tender.
6. Warm the crispy pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for 2-3 minutes.
7. Assemble the kebaps by placing a grilled monkfish fillet on each pita bread, topped with a charred red pepper and a sprinkle of Adana kebap spice mix.
